explanation: The phrase "The autopilot shall change states from TRANSITION to STANDBY" implies that the autopilot will be in the TRANSITION state and then it will be in the STANDBY state.  This can be expressed using the  operator "U" meaning "until". "when the pilot is in control (standby)" means that the autopilot will be in the STANDBY state when the pilot is in control, which is denoted by the atomic proposition "standby".  Since the autopilot must be in the STANDBY state  when the pilot is in control, the final formula is "state_is_TRANSITION U (state_is_STANDBY & standby)".

explanation_dict.natural_language: The autopilot shall change states from TRANSITION to STANDBY
when the pilot is in control (standby)
